materials_science.question: How to improve thermal conductivity in composite materials?
materials_science.hypothesis_title: The incorporation of 5-10 wt% of functionalized graphene oxide (f-GO) with polyethylene glycol (PEG) chains into a polymeric matrix of polyetherimide (PEI) will significantly enhance the thermal condu
materials_science.hypothesis_description: The incorporation of 5-10 wt% of functionalized graphene oxide (f-GO) with polyethylene glycol (PEG) chains into a polymeric matrix of polyetherimide (PEI) will significantly enhance the thermal conductivity of the resulting composite material
variables: The thermal conductivity of the composite material will increase by 40-60% compared to the pristine PEI
The thermal diffusivity of the composite material will be enhanced by 20-30% at a temperature range of 25-100°C
materials_science.expected_outcome: Measure the thermal conductivity and thermal diffusivity of the composite material using the laser flash method (ASTM E1461) and compare with the pristine PEI

biology.question: What are the key factors affecting CRISPR-Cas9 efficiency in gene editing?
biology.hypothesis_title: The efficiency of CRISPR-Cas9 gene editing is significantly enhanced by the presence of the histone deacetylase inhibitor Trichostatin A (TSA), which increases the accessibility of the target gene to
biology.hypothesis_description: The efficiency of CRISPR-Cas9 gene editing is significantly enhanced by the presence of the histone deacetylase inhibitor Trichostatin A (TSA), which increases the accessibility of the target gene to the Cas9 enzyme by 25-40% through chromatin remodeling, resulting in a 30-50% increase in successful gene editing events
variables: The addition of 100-200 nM TSA to CRISPR-Cas9 reactions will increase the frequency of successful gene editing events by 30-50% compared to reactions without TSA

The treatment of cells with TSA will result in a 25-40% increase in the accessibility of the target gene to Cas9, as measured by chromatin immunoprecipitation sequencing (ChIP-seq) and assay for transposase-accessible chromatin using sequencing (ATAC-seq)
biology.expected_outcome: Experiment 1: Treat human embryonic kidney (HEK) 293 cells with 100-200 nM TSA for 24 hours prior to CRISPR-Cas9 transfection and measure the frequency of successful gene editing events using sequencing and fluorescence-activated cell sorting (FACS)

mathematics.question: Can deep learning discover new mathematical conjectures in number theory?
mathematics.hypothesis_title: A deep learning model trained on a dataset of known number theory conjectures can discover new conjectures related to the distribution of prime numbers, with a precision of 95% and a recall of 90%, wi
mathematics.hypothesis_description: A deep learning model trained on a dataset of known number theory conjectures can discover new conjectures related to the distribution of prime numbers, with a precision of 95% and a recall of 90%, within a search space of 10^6 possible conjectures
variables: The model will discover at least 5 new conjectures related to the distribution of prime numbers, with a average precision of 92% and a average recall of 88%, within a search space of 10^6 possible conjectures
The model will reduce the time required to discover new conjectures by 40-60% compared to traditional methods, with a average time reduction of 50% over 10 independent trials
mathematics.expected_outcome: Train a deep learning model on a dataset of known number theory conjectures and evaluate its performance on a hold-out test set
